name: langwatch-experts
description: scenario-expert and langwatch-expert delegate-to agents, backed by the LangWatch MCP server (docs tools work with no API key; set the optional key to unlock traces/observability).

langwatch_api_key.title: LangWatch API key
langwatch_api_key.description: Optional — leave blank for zero-config docs-only mode (the documentation tools work with no key). Set it to unlock live observability and platform tools (search_traces, get_trace, get_analytics, platform_* scenario/suite/run tools). Get a key at https://app.langwatch.ai/settings/api-keys. To set or change it after install, run /plugin configure (or pass --config langwatch_api_key=<key> at install time); the value is stored securely in your OS keychain, not settings.json.

langwatch_endpoint.title: LangWatch endpoint URL
langwatch_endpoint.description: Optional self-hosted or region endpoint. Leave blank to use the default below.
